results.rendered_html: svedu-havya mfn. (prob.) offering the sweat (caused by labour) as a sacrifice, toiling, exerting one's self,  RV.

results.rendered_html:
sveduhavya (sva'idu˚ padap. ) adj. vielleicht den Schweiss (svedu = sveda) als Opfergabe bringend d. h. sich abmühend: induryebhirāṣṭa sveduhavyaiḥ (= svabhūtasamṛddhahaviṣka  SĀY. )  ṚV. 1,121,6 . arcadvṛṣā vṛṣabhiḥ sveduhavyaiḥ (= svāyatteddhahaviṣka, svayaṃprāptendhakaṃ havyaṃ yeṣām  SĀY. ) 173,2 .
— Vgl. 5,7,8 .
